compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("wget -qO - https://artifacts.elastic.co/GPG-KEY-elasticsearch | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/elasticsearch-keyring.gpg");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("echo \"deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/elasticsearch-keyring.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b(t.v(t.f("version",c,p,0)));t.b("/apt/ stable main\" | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/elastic-");t.b(t.v(t.f("version",c,p,0)));t.b(".list");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get update && ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get install elasticsearch");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
